mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ORDERS ( CUSTOMER_ID, BRANCH_ID, KIOSK_ID, ORDER_TYPE, LANGUAGE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, WAITING_NO, RECEIPT_NO, TOTAL_PRICE, COUPON_USED )
VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{branchId}, #{kioskId}, #{orderType}, #{language}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{waitingNo}, #{receiptNo}, #{totalPrice}, #{couponUsed} )

INSERT INTO ORDERITEM ( ORDER_ID, CUP_ID, SIZE_ID, QUANTITY, TOTAL_PRICE )
VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{cupId}, #{sizeId}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice} )
mapper.select:
SELECT *
FROM ORDERS
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
